ModMetaData.name: CeleTech Arsenal - Shuttle Extension (Additional Module)
ModMetaData.description:
Third-party compatibility module pack for CeleTech Arsenal - Shuttle Extension.
First stage: Dubs Bad Hygiene integration scaffolding for shuttle external runtime modules. Dubs Bad Hygiene is treated as an optional soft dependency in this build because the inspected DBH package only declares RimWorld 1.0-1.5 support while the shuttle extension currently targets RimWorld 1.6.
